title: assonia ferruginea
intro: Assonia ferruginea, also known as the rusty stemmed Assonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its flavonoids and phenolic compounds. Herbal preparations of Assonia ferruginea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
